results.matched_effect_cluster: Persona Vectors hidden-state additive steering at specified layer
results.justification: Persona Vectors are directions in activation space scaled by coefficient and added to hidden activations at specified layer — DIRECT TWIN of KATSINA-MASK projection-overlay (additive form ≈ projection form on the persona direction); β-coefficient is the same idea as scaling factor.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Steering via Persona Vectors runtime injection
results.justification: Persona-vector steering at hidden state — runtime, reversible by zero-out coefficient. Same effect.
RepE manipulates representations via projection + addition along concept directions — covers projection-matrix formulation of KATSINA-MASK.

results.matched_effect_cluster: RepE survey: PCA + dot-product projection scoring
results.justification: PCA + dot-product projection is the matrix M_k construction in KATSINA-MASK.
Merging persona vectors for combined personas — covers persona-swappable scheme.
Activation steering at hidden state matching prompting effect — same artefact + same effect.
ICLR 2026 identifies persona-specialized subnetworks via masking calibration — masking strategy is the PROJECTION-MATRIX construction; identification + isolation directly support KATSINA-MASK's M_k.

results.matched_effect_cluster: Fixed-Persona SLM modular memory swap NPC
results.justification: Dynamically swappable memory store at runtime preserving persona without retraining — covers swap mechanism.
